tip_switch_description: When enabled, the custom menu will be displayed. When disabled, followers will not be able to see the menu.
alert_tip_1: 1. This feature only supports verified official accounts/service accounts
alert_tip_2: 2. Reply messages can include articles, images, mini-program cards, text, smart menus, and multiple articles. Multiple replies can be added. Please use the close menu feature carefully. Once closed, the custom menu feature will be disabled and followers will not be able to see the custom menu.
alert_tip_3: 3. After copying to other official accounts, only the default menu will be copied and will not automatically sync to WeChat. You need to save it before it syncs to WeChat. When jumping to a mini-program, the mini-program must be associated with the official account.
alert_tip_4: 4. If you need to see the effect immediately, please unfollow and follow again.
tip_sync_menu: Sync menu will pull the currently effective menu from the official account. Please note that the reply content needs to be refilled.
tip_close_menu_warning: After closing, the menu function of this official account will be disabled
tip_emoji_support: Supports emoji. Main menu supports up to 5 Chinese characters, sub menu supports up to 18 Chinese characters
msg_root_menu_max_5_chars: Main menu name supports up to 5 characters
msg_sub_menu_max_18_chars: Sub menu name supports up to 18 characters
msg_keep_at_least_one_root_menu: Please keep at least one main menu
confirm_close_ability: After closing, this feature will be disabled by default and all official account menus will be disabled. Confirm to close?
confirm_close_app_menu: The custom menu function of this official account will be disabled and followers will not be able to see the menu. Please proceed with caution! To enable the menu later, you can enable the feature and then save
confirm_close_app_menu_local: The current menu is closed. Saving will only be saved locally and will not sync to WeChat.
confirm_open_app_menu: After enabling, please save the menu of this official account. It will sync to WeChat after successful save
confirm_delete_root_menu: After deletion, the content and sub menus under this main menu will be deleted
confirm_delete_sub_menu: After deletion, the content under this sub menu will be deleted
confirm_add_sub_menu: After adding a sub menu, the content of the first-level menu will be cleared. Confirm to add sub menu?
msg_complete_root_menu_config: Please complete the function configuration of main menu "{name}"
msg_complete_sub_menu_config: Please complete the function configuration of sub menu "{subName}" under main menu "{rootName}"
